title: Europe edges toward U.S.-style boat strikes in fight against cocaine surge
summary_full: A French attack that disabled a drug-smuggling boat in the Atlantic opened a new front, but European proposals stop short of the Trump administration’s more aggressive tactics.
summary_public: A French attack that disabled a drug-smuggling boat in the Atlantic opened a new front, but European proposals stop short of the Trump administration’s more aggressive tactics.

FR.label: neutral
FR.evidence: A French attack that disabled a drug-smuggling boat
